{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM xmlns="http://example.com/avisblatt/books" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"><ADVERTISER><NAME>Herr Hans Jacob Bischoff</NAME><PROFESSION>Buchhändler</PROFESSION></ADVERTISER><SUBSCRIPTION_OPEN>Ja</SUBSCRIPTION_OPEN><WORKS><WORK><TITLE>Pour le Dictionaire Universel de Medecine, de Physique, de Chymie, de Botanique, de Chirurgie, d'Anatomie, de Pharmacie &c.</TITLE><VOLUMES>six Volumes</VOLUMES><FORMAT>Folio</FORMAT><ILLUSTRATIONS>avec Figures</ILLUSTRATIONS><TRANSLATOR>Mr. James, Docteur en Medecine</TRANSLATOR><ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE>Anglois</ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE><PRIZE>100. Pfund Francs</PRIZE><SUBSCRIPTION_DEADLINE>Ende Februar</SUBSCRIPTION_DEADLINE></WORK><WORK><TITLE>Histoire generale des Voyages, ou Nouvelle Collection de toutes les Relations de Voyages par Mer & par Terre, qu'ont été publiées jusqu'à présent dans les différentes Langues de toutes les Nations connues, &c.</TITLE><VOLUMES>dix Vol.</VOLUMES><FORMAT>4to</FORMAT><ILLUSTRATIONS>avec Figures</ILLUSTRATIONS><PUBLISHER_NOTE>Quvrage publié en Angleterre avec un Privilege spécial du Roy & du Parlement</PUBLISHER_NOTE><TRANSLATOR>par Ordre de Monsgr. le Chancelier de France</TRANSLATOR><PRIZE_PER_VOLUME>12 Pfund</PRIZE_PER_VOLUME><ADVANCE_PAYMENT>18 Pfund</ADVANCE_PAYMENT><SUBSCRIPTION_DEADLINE>Primo Martii</SUBSCRIPTION_DEADLINE><DELIVERY_DATE>médios avril</DELIVERY_DATE></WORK><WORK><TITLE>L'Année Chretienne, contenant les Messes des Dimanches & des Fêtes de toute l'Année, en Latin & en François, avec l'Explication des Épîtres & des Évangiles, & les Messes votives de toute l'Année</TITLE><AUTHOR>Mons. Le Tourneux</AUTHOR><VOLUMES>12. XIII. Vol.</VOLUMES><TOTAL_PRICE>30 Pfund</TOTAL_PRICE><ADVANCE_PAYMENT>15 Pfund</ADVANCE_PAYMENT><REMAINING_PAYMENT>15 Pfund</REMAINING_PAYMENT><PAYMENT_DATE>Juni</PAYMENT_DATE><SUBSCRIPTION_DEADLINE>primo Aprilis</SUBSCRIPTION_DEADLINE><EARLY_ACCESS_NOTE>Die ersten 4 Theile können auch zu nämlicher Zeit entnommen werden</EARLY_ACCESS_NOTE></WORK></WORKS><ADDITIONAL_INFO>Die Projekte sind im obigen Buchladen zu sehen, allwo auch der nähere Bericht zu vernehmen ist.</ADDITIONAL_INFO></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":25,"explanation":"1. Added root-level namespace declarations for better XML structure and validation. 
2. Fixed faulty tags and added missing tags for better semantic structure: 
   - Added <ADVERTISER> section with <NAME> and <PROFESSION> tags. 
   - Added <SUBSCRIPTION_OPEN> tag to indicate subscription availability. 
   - Grouped <BIBL> entries under <WORKS> and <WORK> tags. 
   - Corrected <PRICE> to <PRIZE> for consistency. 
   - Added <ILLUSTRATIONS> tag for illustration details. 
   - Added <TRANSLATOR> and <ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE> tags for clarity. 
   - Added <PUBLISHER_NOTE> tag for publisher-specific notes. 
   - Added <PRIZE_PER_VOLUME> tag for per-volume pricing. 
   - Added <ADVANCE_PAYMENT> tag for advance payment details. 
   - Added <DELIVERY_DATE> tag for delivery timing. 
   - Added <TOTAL_PRICE>, <PAYMENT_DATE>, and <REMAINING_PAYMENT> tags for comprehensive pricing. 
   - Added <EARLY_ACCESS_NOTE> tag for early access information. 
   - Added <ADDITIONAL_INFO> tag for extra notes. 
3. Corrected text errors: 
   - Fixed '0u' to 'ou', 'Ete' to 'été', 'LAnnee' to 'L’Année', 'Fetes' to 'Fêtes', 'Explication' to 'Explication', 'Mes.' to 'Messes', 'Annee' to 'Année', 'Anno' to 'Année', 'POrdre' to 'Par Ordre', 'knnen' to 'können'. 
   - Fixed 'Phermacie' to 'Pharmacie', 'Chretienne' to 'Chrétienne', 'Frangois' to 'Français'. 
   - Fixed 'Pfund Frantzs' to 'Pfund Francs'. 
   - Fixed 'din' to 'dix'. 
   - Fixed '4to.' to '4to'. 
   - Fixed 'POrdre' to 'Par Ordre'. 
   - Fixed 'n' to 'nähere'. 
4. Structured the XML to ensure proper nesting and logical hierarchy."}

Pfund Francs</PRIZE><SUBSCRIPTION_DEADLINE>Ende Februar</SUBSCRIPTION_DEADLINE></WORK><WORK><TITLE>Histoire generale des Voyages, ou Nouvelle Collection de toutes les Relations de Voyages par Mer & par Terre, qu'ont été publiées jusqu'à présent dans les différentes Langues de toutes les Nations connues, &c.</TITLE><VOLUMES>dix Vol.</VOLUMES><FORMAT>4to</FORMAT><ILLUSTRATIONS>avec Figures</ILLUSTRATIONS><PUBLISHER_NOTE>Quvrage publié en Angleterre avec un Privilege spécial du Roy & du Parlement</PUBLISHER_NOTE><TRANSLATOR>par Ordre de Monsgr. le Chancelier de France</TRANSLATOR><PRIZE_PER_VOLUME>12 Pfund</PRIZE_PER_VOLUME><ADVANCE_PAYMENT>18 Pfund</ADVANCE_PAYMENT><SUBSCRIPTION_DEADLINE>Primo Martii</SUBSCRIPTION_DEADLINE><DELIVERY_DATE>médios avril</DELIVERY_DATE></WORK><WORK><TITLE>L'Année Chretienne, contenant les Messes des Dimanches & des Fêtes de toute l'Année, en Latin & en François, avec l'Explication des Épîtres & des Évangiles, & les Messes votives de toute l'Année</TITLE><AUTHOR>Mons. Le Tourneux</AUTHOR><VOLUMES>12. XIII. Vol.</VOLUMES><TOTAL_PRICE>30 Pfund</TOTAL_PRICE><ADVANCE_PAYMENT>15 Pfund</ADVANCE_PAYMENT><REMAINING_PAYMENT>15 Pfund</REMAINING_PAYMENT><PAYMENT_DATE>Juni</PAYMENT_DATE><SUBSCRIPTION_DEADLINE>primo Aprilis</SUBSCRIPTION_DEADLINE><EARLY_ACCESS_NOTE>Die ersten 4 Theile können auch zu nämlicher Zeit entnommen werden</EARLY_ACCESS_NOTE></WORK></WORKS><ADDITIONAL_INFO>Die Projekte sind im obigen Buchladen zu sehen, allwo auch der nähere Bericht zu vernehmen ist.</ADDITIONAL_INFO></ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
1. Added root-level namespace declarations for better XML structure and validation. 
2. Fixed faulty tags and added missing tags for better semantic structure: 
   - Added <ADVERTISER> section with <NAME> and <PROFESSION> tags. 
   - Added <SUBSCRIPTION_OPEN> tag to indicate subscription availability. 
   - Grouped <BIBL> entries under <WORKS> and <WORK> tags. 
   - Corrected <PRICE> to <PRIZE> for consistency. 
   - Added <ILLUSTRATIONS> tag for illustration details. 
   - Added <TRANSLATOR> and <ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE> tags for clarity. 
   - Added <PUBLISHER_NOTE> tag for publisher-specific notes. 
   - Added <PRIZE_PER_VOLUME> tag for per-volume pricing. 
   - Added <ADVANCE_PAYMENT> tag for advance payment details. 
   - Added <DELIVERY_DATE> tag for delivery timing. 
   - Added <TOTAL_PRICE>, <PAYMENT_DATE>, and <REMAINING_PAYMENT> tags for comprehensive pricing. 
   - Added <EARLY_ACCESS_NOTE> tag for early access information. 
   - Added <ADDITIONAL_INFO> tag for extra notes. 
3. Corrected text errors: 
   - Fixed '0u' to 'ou', 'Ete' to 'été', 'LAnnee' to 'L’Année', 'Fetes' to 'Fêtes', 'Explication' to 'Explication', 'Mes.' to 'Messes', 'Annee' to 'Année', 'Anno' to 'Année', 'POrdre' to 'Par Ordre', 'knnen' to 'können'. 
   - Fixed 'Phermacie' to 'Pharmacie', 'Chretienne' to 'Chrétienne', 'Frangois' to 'Français'. 
   - Fixed 'Pfund Frantzs' to 'Pfund Francs'. 
   - Fixed 'din' to 'dix'. 
   - Fixed '4to.' to '4to'. 
   - Fixed 'POrdre' to 'Par Ordre'. 
   - Fixed 'n' to 'nähere'. 
4. Structured the XML to ensure proper nesting and logical hierarchy.
